title: 03_mapping
description: Output of the triz-parameter-mapper subagent. Per-matrix mapping of the user's contradiction onto the matrix's parameter set. alternatives are FULL pairs per design v6 S9.3a, not single-axis substitutions.

improving_param_id.description: Parameter id in the matrix's native id space. Numeric for altshuller-style matrices; prefixed (e.g. S1, T19) for matrices with meta.parameter_id_style == 'prefixed'.

alternatives.description: Full (improving, worsening) pairs to fall back to if the primary cell is empty. Tried in array order by lookup_principles.py.

no_clean_mapping.description: Mapper's self-declaration that no clean parameter mapping exists. Triggers the no-clean-mapping branch in the state-driver.
